parents.subject: LU-19157 nodemap: revoke export locks on nodemap change

commit.subject: LU-16738 tests: fix test_161 local execution issues
commit.message:
LU-16738 tests: fix test_161 local execution issues

Fix two issues in test_161 that cause failures when running
locally:

1. Fix umount verification grep pattern.

2. Handle comma-separated MGSNID values when extracting network type.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Test-Parameters: testlist=conf-sanity env=ONLY=161,ONLY_REPEAT=5
Fixes: b850dbb71d ("LU-16738 utils: add mgsname mount option for custom hostname display")
Signed-off-by: Chakshu Kansal <ckansal@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I09f8bd3a31d477c4ddade3e0fa9bac26ad168939
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/61392
Reviewed-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@dilger.ca>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
